landing_hero_description: The all-in-one platform for contractors and consultants. Manage contracts, BOQs, progress claims, payments, variation orders, and project schedules — with real-time financial and execution alerts.
landing_features_sub: Everything contractors and consultants need — in one platform
landing_feat_dashboard_desc: Color-coded project matrix (Green/Yellow/Red) with real-time financial & execution status — instant visibility across your entire portfolio.
landing_feat_finance_desc: Track progress claims, interim payments, retention, variation orders, and deferred financing. Automatic gap detection between entitlements and disbursements.
landing_feat_contracts_desc: Digital archive for contracts, addenda, BOQs, specifications, bank awarding letters, and NTP documents — all linked and searchable.
landing_feat_schedule_desc: Baseline vs. actual schedules, time extensions (EOT), excavation notices, NTP tracking — automated delay and acceleration analysis.
landing_feat_alerts_desc: Automated notifications for overdue payments, budget overruns, grace period violations, and approaching deadlines — before they become disputes.
landing_feat_archive_desc: Auto-structured project folders in Arabic & English — invoices, payments, variation orders, drawings, and permits — instant reference system.
landing_cta_title: Ready to Transform Your Project Management?
landing_cta_desc: Join leading contractors and consultants who trust STRUCTORA for end-to-end project control.

pricing_faq_trial_period_a: Yes, all plans come with a free trial period.
